models.title: 1157 LED Bulb with Stock Cover - Dual Function 36 SMD LED Tower - BAY15D Bulb
models.category: Tail, Brake, & Turn LED Bulbs > Miniature > Bayonet Base > Bayonet Base Bulbs > Cars, Trucks, and SUVs
source_fields:
The BAY15D plug-and-play LED replacement bulb is suitable for vehicle applications. The 360° beam angle reduces hot spots and provides a wide viewing angle for all-over light emission. The stock bulb cover encloses the LEDs and gives the bulb a traditional look. Designed to last 30,000 hours- 25 times longer than incandescent bulbs- they are ideal for tail lights, brake lights, and turn signals.
Product Details:
  • Polarity Sensitive (+/-)
  • 12 VDC
  • 3 year warranty

This LED replacement bulb can fit vehicle reverse lights. The 1157 dual-contact, dual-function bulb uses powerful LEDs to emit up to 345 lumens of cool white illumination. LEDs are covered by a plastic lens. It has a tower-style design with a BAY15D 15-mm bayonet base for easy plug-and-play installation—just twist to lock in place. The energy-efficient LED bulb uses only 3 watts of power; an incandescent bulb with comparable light output would consume 30-35 watts. This 1157 LED bulb operates with in a 10-24 VDC range and is designed to last 25 times longer than incandescent bulbs on your car, truck, van, or SUV. Price per bulb.

models.title: 7507 (PY21W) LED Bulb - 18 SMD LED Tower - BAU15S Bulb
models.category: Tail, Brake, & Turn LED Bulbs > Miniature > Bayonet Base > Bayonet Base Bulbs > Cars, Trucks, and SUVs
source_fields: LED replacement bulbs can fit vehicle tail lights, brake lights, reverse lights, turn signals or side marker lights. This 7507 (PY21W) single-contact bulb has 18 LEDs (5050 SMD) that create a 360° viewing angle for better, allover light emission with reduced hot spots. Amber lights feature high-intensity LEDs that are ideal for high brightness LED applications. Tower-style design with a 15-mm BAU15S bayonet base and 150° offset locking pins. Easy plug-and-play installation—just twist to lock in place. The energy-efficient bulb operates with in a wide 10-30V DC range and is designed to last 30,000 hours on your car, truck, SUV, or van—25 times longer than incandescent bulbs. Available in cool and warm white, amber and red. Includes 1 replacement bulb.
